summary: Implemented dark/light theme system with ThemeProvider, toggle buttons in both desktop and mobile headers, CSS variable overrides for light theme, and micro-interactions on task cards.
changes: Created src/hooks/useTheme.tsx — ThemeProvider with dark/light/system modes, localStorage persistence
Wrapped app with ThemeProvider in src/main.tsx
Added sun/moon theme toggle button to DesktopHeader
Added sun/moon theme toggle button to MobileHeader
Added light theme CSS variables in index.css (.light class overrides surface, accent, text, shadow tokens)
Added light theme body background gradients
Added light theme overrides for glass-panel, glass-card, btn-ghost, input-field
Added hover:scale-[1.008] and active:scale-[0.995] micro-interaction on TaskRow cards
CSS transition on body background-color for smooth theme switch
